retry_reason: If the list is empty the device is already removed, so retrying will not change anything and could cause a double-put.
contract_summary: This function removes a _sas_device from the ioc's sas_device list and drops the list's reference on the device via sas_device_put. It is idempotent: calling it twice on the same device is safe (the second call finds an empty list and does nothing). After this function returns, the caller must not use the device pointer without acquiring a new reference. The function assumes the caller holds or ensures appropriate locking (spinlock around list access) to serialize removal.
